commands.review_summary:
The branch adds and tightens WhatsApp QA-lab scenarios, records scenario posture in evidence, updates related docs, and adds WhatsApp support for same-chat message actions plus group participant identity in the QA driver.

PR surface: Source +1029, Tests +1407, Docs +34. Total +2470 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: Partially: current main source shows the same-chat WhatsApp action path requires an explicit target and the QA driver derives sender phone from the group JID. I did not run a live WhatsApp device lane, so the full visible behavior is source-reproducible rather than live-reproduced here.
